claim_title: README projection horizon conflicts with AGENTS horizon

results.description: Verify horizon statements are aligned at 2025-2055 and stale 2025-2045 text is absent.
results.command: readme_old=$(rg -n "2025-2045" README.md | wc -l || true); readme_new=$(rg -n "2025-2055" README.md | wc -l); agents_new=$(rg -n "2025 to 2055|2025-2055" AGENTS.md | wc -l); echo "README_2025_2045_COUNT=$readme_old"; echo "README_2025_2055_COUNT=$readme_new"; echo "AGENTS_2025_2055_COUNT=$agents_new"; if [ "$readme_old" -eq 0 ] && [ "$readme_new" -ge 1 ] && [ "$agents_new" -ge 1 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
